creator: terry-freebsd@glaver.org
text:
Created attachment 242152
Patch to update net-mgmt/mrtg to latest

Attached is a patch to update the MRTG port from 2.17.4 to 2.17.10 and make portlint happy.

cd /usr/ports/net-mgmt/mrtg
patch -E < update-2_17_10.diff

Two existing patches are removed for the following reasons:

1) Remove patch-lib-mrtg2-SNMP_Session-pm as it was upstreamed in f70bc9b
2) Remove patch-src__rateup.c as it was upstreamed in 9572383, ba60fe9 and e8e5fb1
